# PlanetShine Cleaning Services

> PlanetShine is an Australian-owned professional cleaning company delivering premium residential and commercial cleaning services across all of Australia — from Sydney Metro and the Hunter Region to Darwin, Perth and beyond. Fully insured, available 24/7, free site inspection.

## About PlanetShine

PlanetShine Cleaning Services is based in Scone, NSW and actively services the Hunter Region, Sydney Metro, New England and Northern Tablelands, and Central West NSW, with a rapidly expanding national network across all Australian states and territories.

## Services

- Commercial Cleaning — offices, warehouses, retail, workplaces
- Residential Cleaning — homes, apartments, regular cleans
- Office Cleaning — scheduled workplace cleaning programs
- End of Lease Cleaning — bond cleans, handover-ready properties
- Window Cleaning — residential and commercial
- Deep Cleaning — intensive top-to-bottom cleans
- Hospitality Cleaning — pubs, clubs, hotels, restaurants
- Fleet Cleaning — mobile on-site vehicle cleaning
- Strata Cleaning — common areas, apartment complexes
- School Cleaning — educational facilities, childcare centres
- Retail Cleaning — stores, showrooms, shopping environments
- Rubbish Removal — homes, offices, commercial sites
- Post-Construction Cleaning — builders cleans, handover ready
- Garden & Lawn Maintenance — grounds maintenance
- Kitchen Deep Cleaning — commercial and domestic kitchens
- Home Duties Assistance — household support services

## Service Areas

Currently active: Sydney Metro, Hunter Region (Newcastle, Maitland, Singleton, Muswellbrook, Scone), New England & Northern Tablelands (Tamworth, Armidale), Central West NSW (Bathurst, Orange, Dubbo)

Expanding to: ACT (Canberra), Queensland (Brisbane, Gold Coast, Toowoomba, Cairns), Victoria (Melbourne, Geelong, Ballarat, Bendigo), Western Australia (Perth), South Australia (Adelaide), Northern Territory (Darwin), Tasmania (Hobart, Launceston)

## Contact

- Phone: +61 451 311 905
- Email: info@planetshine.com.au
- Website: https://planetshine.com.au
- Location: Scone, NSW 2337, Australia
- Hours: Open 24 hours, 7 days a week

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2019
- Fully insured with public liability coverage
- Eco-friendly, non-toxic cleaning products
- Free no-obligation site inspections
- 24/7 availability including after-hours and emergency call-outs
- Response within 24 hours guaranteed
